title: Power Integrations Inc (POWI) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Power Integrations Inc (POWI) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview. The consensus estimate for Q4 2024 revenue is $105.14 million, and the earnings are expected to come in at $0.12 per share. Fourth-Quarter Revenue Outlook is $105 million, plus or minus $5 million, reflecting industry demand softness and specific appliance segment weakness, but with year-over-year growth expected at a 17% increase at the midpoint. Full year 2024 revenues are expected to be $418.84 million and earnings are expected to be $0.54 per share. Over the past 90 days, revenue estimates for Power Integrations have declined from $431.90 million to $418.84 million for the full year 2024, and from $514.01 million to $476.63 million for 2025. Similarly, earnings estimates have decreased from $0.58 per share to $0.54 per share for the full year 2024, and from $1.13 per share to $0.90 per share for 2025. The outlook reflects industry-wide demand softness, with 2024 revenues down from the prior year due to losses in the China cell phone market early in the year, though combined sales into Industrial, Consumer and Computer categories are forecast to be up mid to high teens for 2024.
